title: BAI Issues Circular for Form-1 for Badminton Sportspersons
indian_angle: This circular from BAI is crucial for Indian badminton players requiring official documentation.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released a circular detailing the procedure for issuing Form-1 to badminton sportspersons.

title: Indian Shuttlers Must Learn to Win Without Constant Coaching Presence
indian_angle: This opinion piece highlights a critical area for development in Indian badminton players: self-reliance on court.
summary: An article argues that Indian shuttlers need to develop independent decision-making skills to succeed without continuous coach intervention during matches.

title: Badminton's 3x15 Scoring System to Debut in All Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This marks a significant rule change for all domestic badminton tournaments in India, impacting player strategy and game flow.
summary: The 3x15 scoring system will be implemented across all domestic badminton tournaments in India, with its debut set for Ernakulam.

title: Kidambi Srikanth Falls Short in US Open Final
indian_angle: India's Kidambi Srikanth reached a Super 300 final, demonstrating his continued competitive form on the international circuit.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth was defeated in the final match of the US Open, missing out on the title.

title: Rounak Chouhan Stuns World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian talent Rounak Chouhan secured a major upset victory over a top-ranked player at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, caused a stir by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open Super 300.
